title: Clair de Lune 2 Pack Fitted Jersey Cotton Cot Bed Sheets 70 x 140 cm (Cream)
features: SUPER SOFT COMFORT: Experience the ultimate in comfort, crafted from 100% cotton jersey, these cot bed sheets are exceptionally soft and gentle against your baby's delicate skin.

PEACE OF MIND: Our sheets are made with OEKO-Tex-certified fabrics, ensuring they are free from harmful substances. Plus, their breathable and moisture-wicking properties help regulate your child's temperature for a comfortable sleep.
EASY FIT: Sheets Measure 140 x 70 cm with an easy-stretch elasticated edge, you can fit the sheets over a standard cot bed mattress. (We recommend checking your mattress size before you purchase.)
MODERN STYLE: Choose from a range of colours and plain styles to suit your unique nursery decor. Our sheets add a touch of modern elegance to any baby's sleep space.
MACHINE WASHABLE: Prepared for life’s little accidents, the sheets are machine washable at 40 degrees. They’re fade and shrink resistant so your little one can enjoy a clean and fresh sleep space.
